scripts.start:fico: concurrently "npm run fico-backend" "npm run fico-frontend" "npm run fico-db4-backend" "npm run fico-db4-frontend"
scripts.mm-core: concurrently "npm --prefix mm/core/backend run dev" "npm --prefix mm/core/frontend start"
scripts.mm-creation: concurrently "npm --prefix mm/creation/backend run dev" "npm --prefix mm/creation/frontend start"
scripts.mm-inspection: concurrently "npm --prefix mm/inspection/backend run dev" "npm --prefix mm/inspection/frontend start"
scripts.mm-production: concurrently "npm --prefix mm/production/backend run dev" "npm --prefix mm/production/frontend start"
scripts.mm-quality: concurrently "npm --prefix mm/quality/backend run dev" "npm --prefix mm/quality/frontend start"
scripts.mm-warehouse: concurrently "npm --prefix mm/warehouse/backend run dev" "npm --prefix mm/warehouse/frontend start"
scripts.start:mm: concurrently "npm run mm-core" "npm run mm-creation" "npm run mm-inspection" "npm run mm-production" "npm run mm-quality" "npm run mm-warehouse"
scripts.sd-delivery: concurrently "npm --prefix sd/delivery/backend run dev" "npm --prefix sd/delivery/frontend start"
scripts.sd-sales-flow: concurrently "npm --prefix sd/sales-flow/backend run dev" "npm --prefix sd/sales-flow/frontend start"
scripts.sd-sales-order: concurrently "npm --prefix sd/sales-order/backend run dev" "npm --prefix sd/sales-order/frontend start"
scripts.sd-stock: concurrently "npm --prefix sd/sales-distribution-stock/backend run dev" "npm --prefix sd/sales-distribution-stock/frontend start"
scripts.start:sd: concurrently "npm run sd-delivery" "npm run sd-sales-flow"  "npm run sd-stock"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:fico" "npm run start:mm" "npm run start:sd"
